prompt: A highly embellished full-body anime fantasy illustration of SOPHIE, a young elegant female alchemist-mage standing in the center of a vast celestial library laboratory. She has platinum blonde hair in a soft short bob with a side ponytail and a large crystalline flower hair ornament, though her face is obscured by a flat pale square censor block. She wears an ornate white and icy-blue dress with silver filigree, corset lacing, layered ruffles, translucent trailing panels, detached flowing sleeves, gemstone pendants, thigh garter ornaments, and white high-heeled ankle boots with metallic trims. Two glowing blue potion bottles hang at her hip. Her pose is graceful and confident: one hand raised with a floating faceted blue crystal hovering above her palm, the other holding an open magic book that projects transparent holographic pages and arcane interface diagrams in neon blue. The environment is a grand circular observatory-like library with towering bookshelves, alchemical instruments, astrolabes, hanging ornaments, glassware, candles, and luminous magical symbols. A huge backlit arched window behind her casts cool heavenly light. The floor beneath her is covered in glowing concentric magic circles and reflections, surrounded by crystalline blue flowers and sparkling particles. The composition is vertical, centered, and extremely polished, with dense decorative detail, ethereal lighting, layered translucency, shimmering highlights, and a palette dominated by white, silver, sapphire, and pale violet. Include large decorative title text on the left reading SOPHIE, smaller Japanese text beneath reading ソフィー, a small "CV:" line below, a short block of tiny English flavor text on the lower left, and a luminous blue hologram panel on the right with the word SOPHIC. Make it feel like a luxurious character key visual or promotional poster for a magical science heroine, ultra-detailed, glossy, radiant, and intentionally over-the-top.
